title: Records of Lynda Chapman, CDC Chief Operating Officer

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I request digital delivery of the following records:

Custodian/Office: Records belonging to, created by, or received by Lynda Chapman, Chief Operating Officer (COO), CDC.

Record Types: All emails, calendar items, attachments, written notes (handwritten or typed), meeting notes/summaries, memoranda, directives, briefings, taskers, instant messages/chats archived by CDC, and any other records maintained or controlled by CDC for this custodian.

Date Range: From the date Ms. Chapman assumed the role of Chief Operating Officer to the present.

Format & Delivery: Please provide records electronically (searchable PDFs or native formats where feasible) via digital delivery.

If any portions are withheld, please release all reasonably segregable non-exempt material and provide a Vaughn index describing withheld records and the basis for each exemption.

Fees: I request a fee waiver and classification as a requester seeking records in the public interest. If fees are expected to exceed $50, please notify me in advance.

Thank you for your assistance.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jessica Elm
